languages.text: "Такая вероятность была рассчитана, хоть и признана нежелательной".
"This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."
languages.original_text: "Такая вероятность была рассчитана, хоть и признана нежелательной".

traits.locale_text: "This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."
"This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."
"This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."

languages.text: 「この確率は計算されたが、望ましくない」
languages.original_text: "This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: 「この確率は計算されたが、望ましくない」

languages.text: «La posibilidad entraba en nuestros cálculos, pero era indeseable».
languages.original_text: "This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: «La posibilidad entraba en nuestros cálculos, pero era indeseable».

languages.text: "Diese Wahrscheinlichkeit wurde berechnet, aber als nicht wünschenswert bewertet."
languages.original_text: "This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Wahrscheinlichkeit wurde berechnet, aber als nicht wünschenswert bewertet."

languages.text: « Cette probabilité a été calculée, mais a été jugée indésirable. »
languages.original_text: "This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: « Cette probabilité a été calculée, mais a été jugée indésirable. »

languages.text: “该概率分支已被计算，但被判定为不可取。”
languages.original_text: "This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: “该概率分支已被计算，但被判定为不可取。”

languages.text: "Bu olasılık hesaplanmış olup istenmeyen olarak değerlendirilmiştir."
languages.original_text: "This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: "Bu olasılık hesaplanmış olup istenmeyen olarak değerlendirilmiştir."
